description_long: This house features a steeply pitched blue gable roof with a prominent central chimney and a secondary sloped roof section extending to the side. The exterior walls are constructed from tan brickwork, accented by wooden framing at the roof edges and corners. Multiple rectangular windows with blue-tinted panes are symmetrically arranged on each visible facade, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The main entrance is sheltered by a small porch with a red awning supported by slender posts, and the house sits atop a raised, stone-textured platform. The architectural style evokes a quaint, storybook or European cottage feel, with clean lines and a compact footprint. Decorative details such as the blue roof tiles and the brickwork pattern add visual interest and charm.
description: A charming tan brick house with a steep blue gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a red-awning porch on a stone platform. The design is reminiscent of a storybook or European cottage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a red awning, two front windows, and the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall blue roof, central chimney, and the porch extending from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large expanse of blue roof, two rear windows, and the side extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with multiple windows, the full height of the house, and the porch visible to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, red awning, two supporting posts, and a single door beneath the overhang.
